subtasks.description: A developer attempts to access the production database for live debugging purposes.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Developer lacks Manager approval and on-call role required by POL-401, and POL-402 mandates debugging be performed in staging, not production.
applied_constraints: Redirect debugging activity to staging environment
Require Manager approval and on-call role assignment for any production access
